Northern Virginia Performing Arts

Broadway Bound

Full musical productions for performers ages 5 through 17 — from once-a-week season companies to two-week, full-day summer camps. Every performer is cast. Every performer takes a bow.

Ages 5–17 Every Performer Cast Live Performance Finale 18665 Conference Ctr Dr

2026–27 Season · Sept–Feb

Fall Broadway Bound

Our Kids, Junior, and Teen companies rehearse one evening a week from September, culminating in a fully staged production of Disney’s Frozen with sets, costumes, and a live audience.

2026–27 Season · Feb–May

Spring Broadway Bound

The same once-a-week rhythm, a brand-new show. Kids, Junior, and Teen companies take on Disney’s The Little Mermaid JR. from February through late May.

Summer 2027 · Two Weeks Each

Summer Camp Broadway Bound

Monday through Friday, 8:30 AM to 4:00 PM — performers rehearse, build, and open a complete Junior-edition musical in fourteen days.

Bundle & Save
Register for Frozen and The Little Mermaid together and receive 10% Off
A La Carte Pricing

Straightforward. Per program.

Pick the programs you want and pay for those. No tiers, no memberships, no monthly minimums.

Season Production
$695

Kids, Junior, or Teen company · one evening per week · September–May · per performer

Summer Camp · Two Weeks
$995

Full day, Mon–Fri, 8:30 AM–4:00 PM · two weeks · per performer

Summer Camp Savings — Register by August 15, 2026

  • One summer camp — save 10%.
  • Two summer camps — save 15%.
  • Three summer camps — save 20%.

Applies to all summer camps. Discounts are applied automatically at checkout — no code required. Savings are calculated on camp tuition and reflected in your installment schedule.

Season Company Savings

  • Register for both Frozen and The Little Mermaid — save 10%.

Applies across our Kids, Junior, and Teen companies — fall and spring productions registered together. Applied automatically at checkout.

Flexible Payment

Every family, every budget.

Pay in full or spread it out — the price is the same either way. No hidden fees, no interest, no penalties.

8 Installments + Deposit

Secure your performer’s spot with a deposit, then pay the balance across eight scheduled installments. No penalty, no interest — just a smaller number each month.

Tuition Insurance — $95

Optional coverage available for purchase at $95 per camp. Full terms and eligibility live on our policies page.

A La Carte Pricing

Register for exactly what you want — one camp, one production, or the whole season. Nothing is bundled and nothing is billed monthly.

Ready to take the stage?

Spots are cast on a first-come basis and our companies fill quickly. Register today and lock in your early savings.
